perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Animation starts with a close-up of a citrus-flavored ice cream with wide eyes against a pastel background. (2) A bald animated man appears with a grumpy expression, touching his stomach in a conflicted manner. (3) A small blue creature with bat wings and a mischievous face appears behind the man's head, whispering to him. (4) The man crosses his arms and looks determined, then looks surprised as the creature reappears closer. (5) Transition to live-action shots where the blue creature is revealed as a physical plush coin purse. (6) The plushie is shown clipped to a green jacket, then to a grey backpack, and finally its back pocket is shown holding various cards. (7) A person's hands pour coins into the open purse on a wooden table. (8) The purse is placed on top of a sleeping ginger and white cat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin, sounding excited about ice cream, over upbeat, electronic BGM. (2) The voice becomes deeper and more frustrated as the animated man describes his diet. (3) A high-pitched, mocking voice enters, representing the creature's temptation. (4) An upbeat J-pop style song with female vocals singing 'Mochiron Daisuki Ice Cream' plays briefly. (5) Dialogue between the grumpy male voice and the high-pitched voice continues. (6) The high-pitched voice dominates the second half, narrating product features with high enthusiasm over continuous, fast-paced electronic music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Oh My God', 'This ice cream looks too delicious' (Traditional Chinese). (2) Functional Text: 'But I'm on a diet now... can't eat any sweets'. (3) Decorative Text: 'Panni Panni' (叛逆叛逆) in stylized font. (4) Functional Text: 'I don't have money on me... I've grown up... I can control my emotions'. (5) Decorative Text: 'Pannishi' (叛逆仙子) as a character name. (6) Functional Text: 'Pannishi Classic Retractable Coin Purse 2nd Gen', 'Can be hung anywhere', 'Back can hold EasyCard, credit cards'. (7) Functional Text: 'Sale dates 1/10-11'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Animated Diet struggle) -> Conflict (Creature temptation) -> Resolution (Product reveal) -> Live-action Features Demo -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 animated male protagonist in the first half; 1 real male actor shown partially (hands, back, torso) in the live-action demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An animated bald man with thick eyebrows and a black t-shirt who is struggling with a diet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts with a flat graphic background for the animation, then moves to real-world locations including a street with plants, a room with a wooden closet, and a sofa area with a cat.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even lighting in both animated and live-action segments.

vocal_qualities.pitch: Deep for man, high for creature

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Intervention -> Product Integration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for a plush coin purse based on the 'Pannishi' (Rebellious Fairy) character. It uses a comedic animated scenario about the internal conflict of dieting to hook the viewer, then introduces the character mascot as a physical, functional item (a coin purse). The purpose is to demonstrate the product's practicality and aesthetic appeal to drive sales for an upcoming market event.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the product, demonstrates its features for nearly half its duration, and provides specific sale dates and locations.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The character 'Pannishi' and the 'Panni Panni' catchphrase.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular trend in Asian social media where short, comedic animated skits are used to build a brand identity for merchandise.
